content.thinking: Good, I can see 8 files with 21 insertions and 21 deletions. Let me get the full diff to understand what changes were made.

Now I understand the changes. This is a migration from using `.tb` (an undeclared/internal field on RecordId) to using `.table.name` (the official SDK API). The changes include:

1. Updated AGENTS.md to document the new best practice
2. Migrated 6 files across extraction and workspace modules from `.tb` to `.table.name`
3. Removed the custom `TbRecordId` type augmentation from extraction/types.ts

This is a good, focused refactoring. Let me now:
1. Commit the changes
2. Push to origin
3. Create the PR

Let me start with git status and then commit.

content.thinking: Good, all 8 files are unstaged. Let me stage them and commit with an appropriate message. This is a refactoring to use the official SurrealDB SDK API instead of the internal `.tb` property.

input.command:
git add AGENTS.md app/src/server/extraction/context-loaders.ts app/src/server/extraction/embedding-writeback.ts app/src/server/extraction/entity-text.ts app/src/server/extraction/extract-graph.ts app/src/server/extraction/types.ts app/src/server/workspace/conversation-sidebar.ts app/src/server/workspace/workspace-routes.ts && git commit -m "$(cat <<'EOF'
Migrate RecordId table access from .tb to .table.name SDK API

Replace custom .tb property (undeclared internal field) with official SDK's .table.name method across extraction and workspace modules. Remove TbRecordId type augmentation and update AGENTS.md to document the new best practice. This ensures future code uses the public SDK contract instead of relying on runtime implementation details that may break on upgrade.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Haiku 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
)"
